commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=dda61a34d8df61a2491420e6723b2846af0070eb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds trailing `notify=false` parsing in Telegram `deliverReplies`, strips the marker from reply text, forwards marker-derived silent delivery to plain text sends, and adds focused delivery tests.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +31. Total +54 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current heartbeat sends use `sendDurableMessageBatch` into the Telegram outbound adapter, while this PR changes `deliverReplies`; the media branch also visibly keeps `params.silent` instead of marker-derived silent intent.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor or maintainer follow-up is needed because the code blocker spans the correct delivery boundary and proof is mock-only; ClawSweeper repair should not queue while the real-proof gate remains unmet.

target.title: fix(telegram): strip trailing notify=false marker and send as silent
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
